/**
 * estimateRecipePricing — Authoritative Backend Pricing Engine v5
 *
 * PHASE 2: CANONICAL COVERAGE COMPLETION
 *
 * SOURCE_PATH labels (explicit per ingredient):
 *   exact_canonical   — matched a specific canonical entry by regex
 *   floor_protected   — matched canonical but rate was below ingredient floor
 *   subtype_fallback  — matched a generic fallback within the category (e.g. plain "fish")
 *   category_fallback — no canonical match; used category range estimate
 *
 * PIPELINE:
 *   1. Match ingredient name against CANONICAL_PRICE_TABLE (most-specific first)
 *   2. Use entry.base_rate clamped within [entry.min_rate, entry.max_rate]
 *   3. Apply poultry protein protection
 *   4. Apply display floor
 *   5. category_fallback ONLY for truly unrecognised ingredients
 */

import { createClientFromRequest } from 'npm:@base44/sdk@0.8.23';

// ─── PHASE 3: AUTO-CANONICAL ENGINE ──────────────────────────────────────────
// Synonym map, auto-canonical generator, and normalizer — inlined to avoid
// cross-file imports (each Deno function is deployed independently).

// Category medians for auto-canonical generation
const CATEGORY_MEDIANS = {
  poultry:   { base: 1.20, min: 0.90, max: 1.70 },
  meat:      { base: 1.50, min: 1.00, max: 2.20 },
  seafood:   { base: 2.00, min: 1.40, max: 3.00 },
  eggs:      { base: 0.70, min: 0.50, max: 1.00 },
  cheese:    { base: 1.80, min: 1.20, max: 2.80 },
  dairy:     { base: 0.30, min: 0.12, max: 0.65 },
  vegetable: { base: 0.28, min: 0.12, max: 0.60 },
  fruit:     { base: 0.35, min: 0.15, max: 0.80 },
  grain:     { base: 0.22, min: 0.08, max: 0.55 },
  spice:     { base: 0.72, min: 0.40, max: 1.20 },
  herb:      { base: 0.65, min: 0.38, max: 1.00 },
  oil:       { base: 0.45, min: 0.18, max: 0.90 },
  condiment: { base: 0.35, min: 0.12, max: 0.80 },
  pantry:    { base: 0.25, min: 0.05, max: 0.80 },
  legume:    { base: 0.22, min: 0.10, max: 0.45 },
  nut:       { base: 1.20, min: 0.45, max: 2.20 },
  seed:      { base: 0.65, min: 0.30, max: 1.20 },
  default:   { base: 0.40, min: 0.12, max: 1.00 },

// In-memory auto-canonical cache — entries generated for first-seen unknowns
const AUTO_CANONICAL_CACHE = {};

// Category guesser — used when canonical lookup AND synonym lookup both fail
function guessIngredientCategory(name) {
  const n = (name || '').toLowerCase();
  if (/chicken|turkey|duck|goose|poultry|hen|quail|pheasant/.test(n)) return 'poultry';
  if (/beef|veal|pork|lamb|mutton|venison|bison|rabbit|steak|mince|sausage|bacon|ham|chorizo|prosciutto|pancetta|salami|pepperoni/.test(n)) return 'meat';
  if (/salmon|tuna|cod|tilapia|halibut|trout|mackerel|sardine|anchovy|shrimp|prawn|scallop|lobster|crab|mussel|clam|oyster|squid|octopus|herring|pollock|snapper|fish|seafood|caviar/.test(n)) return 'seafood';
  if (/\begg\b|\beggs\b/.test(n)) return 'eggs';
  if (/parmesan|mozzarella|cheddar|feta|ricotta|brie|camembert|gouda|gruyere|halloumi|burrata|paneer|cheese/.test(n)) return 'cheese';
  if (/\bbutter\b|\bghee\b|cream\b|yogurt|yoghurt|\bmilk\b|kefir|labneh|quark/.test(n)) return 'dairy';
  if (/olive oil|sesame oil|coconut oil|avocado oil|vegetable oil|sunflower oil|canola oil|\boil\b/.test(n)) return 'oil';
  if (/almond|walnut|cashew|pistachio|pecan|hazelnut|macadamia|brazil nut|pine nut|peanut|chestnut|\bnut\b/.test(n)) return 'nut';
  if (/chia seed|flax seed|hemp seed|sesame seed|pumpkin seed|sunflower seed|\bseed\b/.test(n)) return 'seed';
  if (/chickpea|lentil|black bean|kidney bean|white bean|pinto bean|edamame|tofu|tempeh|\bbean\b|\bbeans\b/.test(n)) return 'legume';
  if (/flour|pasta|\brice\b|noodle|bread|dough|pastry|cereal|\boat\b|barley|quinoa|couscous|bulgur|millet|spelt|farro/.test(n)) return 'grain';
  if (/saffron|vanilla|cardamom|nutmeg|cinnamon|\bpepper\b|paprika|cumin|turmeric|garam masala|curry powder|allspice|cloves|star anise|chili|chilli/.test(n)) return 'spice';
  if (/basil|parsley|thyme|rosemary|oregano|dill|\bmint\b|chive|cilantro|\bcoriander\b|sage|tarragon|lemongrass/.test(n)) return 'herb';
  if (/vinegar|soy sauce|fish sauce|ketchup|mustard|mayonnaise|honey|maple syrup|miso|tahini|pesto|salsa|curry paste|hot sauce|bbq|hoisin|teriyaki|worcestershire|\bwine\b|\bbeer\b|broth|stock/.test(n)) return 'condiment';
  if (/tomato|onion|garlic|carrot|potato|spinach|broccoli|cauliflower|zucchini|courgette|\bpeppers\b|capsicum|mushroom|asparagus|kale|cabbage|lettuce|celery|cucumber|\bpeas\b|\bcorn\b|leek|fennel|eggplant|aubergine|beetroot/.test(n)) return 'vegetable';
  if (/apple|banana|mango|berry|berries|lemon|lime|orange|avocado|grape|cherry|peach|pear|plum|\bfig\b|melon|pineapple|kiwi|papaya|passion fruit|\bdate\b/.test(n)) return 'fruit';
  if (/\bsalt\b|\bsugar\b|starch|baking|yeast|cocoa|chocolate|\bvanilla\b|syrup|\bjam\b|\bjelly\b/.test(n)) return 'pantry';
  return 'default';
}

// Normalize ingredient name: strip adjectives, collapse whitespace
function normalizeIngredientName(raw) {
  if (!raw) return '';
  let n = raw.toLowerCase().trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' ');
  n = n.replace(/\b(freshly?|lightly|thinly|finely|roughly|coarsely)\s+/gi, '');
  n = n.replace(/\b(fresh|dried|frozen|canned|tinned|organic|raw|whole|chopped|diced|sliced|minced|grated|shredded|blanched|roasted|grilled|baked|cooked|toasted|ground|crushed|puréed|pureed|pickled|smoked|steamed|boiled|dehydrated)\s+/gi, '');
  n = n.replace(/\b(large|medium|small|big|tiny|baby|young|aged|mature|ripe|unripe|mini|giant|jumbo|regular)\s+/gi, '');
  n = n.replace(/\b(french|italian|spanish|greek|japanese|chinese|thai|indian|moroccan|mexican|american|british|australian|european|asian)\s+/gi, '');
  return n.trim();
}

// Synonym lookup: returns canonical text if alias found
function lookupSynonym(n) {
  if (SYNONYM_MAP[n]) return SYNONYM_MAP[n];
  // Contained match (alias is a substring of input)
  for (const [alias, canonical] of Object.entries(SYNONYM_MAP)) {
    if (alias.length > 4 && n.includes(alias)) return canonical;
  }
  return null;
}

// ─── MODIFIER DETECTION ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const MODIFIER_TABLE = [
  { pattern: /\bwagyu\b/i,         multiplier: 2.5,  type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\btruffle\b/i,       multiplier: 2.2,  type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\bimported\b/i,      multiplier: 1.6,  type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\bartisan\b/i,       multiplier: 1.5,  type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\bspecialty\b/i,     multiplier: 1.45, type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\bpremium\b/i,       multiplier: 1.4,  type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\bwild[\s-]caught\b/i, multiplier: 1.35, type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\baged\b/i,          multiplier: 1.3,  type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\borganic\b/i,       multiplier: 1.2,  type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\bgeneric\b/i,       multiplier: 0.75, type: 'budget' },
  { pattern: /\bbasic\b/i,         multiplier: 0.80, type: 'budget' },
  { pattern: /\bstandard\b/i,      multiplier: 0.82, type: 'budget' },
  { pattern: /\bfrozen\b/i,        multiplier: 0.78, type: 'budget' },
  { pattern: /\bcanned\b/i,        multiplier: 0.72, type: 'budget' },
  { pattern: /\btinned\b/i,        multiplier: 0.72, type: 'budget' },
  { pattern: /\bdried\b/i,         multiplier: 1.15, type: 'form' },
  { pattern: /\bpowder\b/i,        multiplier: 1.20, type: 'form' },
  { pattern: /\bconcentrate\b/i,   multiplier: 1.25, type: 'form' },
  { pattern: /\bsliced\b/i,        multiplier: 1.05, type: 'prepared' },
  { pattern: /\bground\b/i,        multiplier: 1.05, type: 'prepared' },
  { pattern: /\bminced\b/i,        multiplier: 1.05, type: 'prepared' },
  { pattern: /\bprepared\b/i,      multiplier: 1.08, type: 'prepared' },
  { pattern: /\bcooked\b/i,        multiplier: 1.08, type: 'prepared' },
];

function detectModifiers(ingredientName) {
  const n = (ingredientName || '').toLowerCase();
  const detected = [];
  let compoundMultiplier = 1.0;
  for (const mod of MODIFIER_TABLE) {
    if (mod.pattern.test(n)) {
      const label = mod.pattern.source.replace(/\\b/g, '').replace(/\\s[\*\+\?]*/g, ' ').replace(/[\[\]\(\)\^$]/g, '').trim();
      detected.push(label);
      compoundMultiplier *= mod.multiplier;
    }
  }
  // Clamp: max 3.0x, min 0.6x
  compoundMultiplier = Math.min(3.0, Math.max(0.6, compoundMultiplier));
  return { multiplier: compoundMultiplier, modifiers_detected: detected };
}

// Generate context-aware auto-canonical entry for unknown ingredient
function generateAutoCanonical(ingredientName) {
  const category = guessIngredientCategory(ingredientName);
  const medians = CATEGORY_MEDIANS[category] ?? CATEGORY_MEDIANS.default;
  const key = ingredientName.toLowerCase().trim();
  if (AUTO_CANONICAL_CACHE[key]) return AUTO_CANONICAL_CACHE[key];

  const { multiplier, modifiers_detected } = detectModifiers(ingredientName);
  const adjustedRate = medians.base * multiplier;
  const clampedRate = Math.min(medians.max, Math.max(medians.min, adjustedRate));

  const entry = {
    name: ingredientName, category,
    base_rate: parseFloat(clampedRate.toFixed(4)),
    min_rate: medians.min, max_rate: medians.max,
    edible_ratio: 1.0, source: 'auto_canonical',
    confidence: modifiers_detected.length > 0 ? 'low-medium' : 'low',
    modifier_detected: modifiers_detected,
    modifier_multiplier: parseFloat(multiplier.toFixed(4)),
    adjusted_base_rate: parseFloat(adjustedRate.toFixed(4)),
    median_base_rate: medians.base,
    was_clamped: adjustedRate !== clampedRate,
  };
  AUTO_CANONICAL_CACHE[key] = entry;
  return entry;
}

// ─── CATEGORY RANGES — FALLBACK ONLY ─────────────────────────────────────────
const CATEGORY_RANGES = {
  poultry:    { min: 0.70, max: 3.00 },
  meat:       { min: 0.70, max: 6.00 },
  seafood:    { min: 0.80, max: 15.00 },
  eggs:       { min: 0.45, max: 2.00 },
  cheese:     { min: 0.55, max: 4.00 },
  dairy:      { min: 0.08, max: 2.50 },
  vegetable:  { min: 0.08, max: 3.00 },
  fruit:      { min: 0.08, max: 1.60 },
  grain:      { min: 0.05, max: 1.80 },
  spice:      { min: 0.40, max: 70.00 },
  herb:       { min: 0.38, max: 1.50 },
  oil:        { min: 0.14, max: 2.60 },
  condiment:  { min: 0.08, max: 1.80 },
  pantry:     { min: 0.01, max: 6.00 },

const CATEGORY_DISPLAY_MIN = {
  poultry: 0.80, meat: 0.80, seafood: 0.80, eggs: 0.10,
  cheese: 0.10, dairy: 0.03, vegetable: 0.01, fruit: 0.02,
  grain: 0.01, spice: 0.005, herb: 0.005, oil: 0.02,
  condiment: 0.005, pantry: 0.005, legume: 0.02, nut: 0.08,
  seed: 0.02, default: 0.01,
};

const SANITY_MAX_PER_INGREDIENT = {
  poultry: 60.0, meat: 80.0, seafood: 120.0, eggs: 12.0,
  cheese: 30.0, dairy: 20.0, vegetable: 25.0, fruit: 18.0,
  grain: 35.0, spice: 20.0, herb: 12.0, oil: 20.0,
  condiment: 15.0, pantry: 15.0, legume: 12.0, nut: 40.0,
  seed: 15.0, default: 40.0,
};

const POULTRY_USD_MIN_PER_100G = 1.916;
const POULTRY_ILS_RATE_REF     = 3.13;

function classifyDoughSubcategory(ingredientName) {
  const n = (ingredientName || '').toLowerCase();
  if (/puff\s*pastry|filo|phyllo|croissant\s*dough|laminated/.test(n)) return 'grain_puff';
  if (/shortcrust|pastry\s*dough|pie\s*crust|tart\s*dough/.test(n)) return 'grain_enriched';
  if (/brioche|enriched|pizza\s*dough|focaccia|naan/.test(n)) return 'grain_enriched';
  if (/dough/.test(n)) return 'grain_basic';
  return null;
}

const DOUGH_RANGES = {
  grain_puff:     { min: 0.80, max: 1.80 },
  grain_enriched: { min: 0.30, max: 0.70 },
  grain_basic:    { min: 0.20, max: 0.45 },
};

function guessCategory(ingredientName) {
  const n = (ingredientName || '').toLowerCase();
  if (/chicken|turkey|duck|poultry|hen|goose/.test(n)) return 'poultry';
  if (/beef|pork|lamb|veal|meat|steak|mince|sausage|bacon|ham|chorizo|prosciutto/.test(n)) return 'meat';
  if (/fish|salmon|tuna|cod|shrimp|prawn|seafood|crab|lobster|mussel|clam/.test(n)) return 'seafood';
  if (/egg/.test(n)) return 'eggs';
  if (/cheese|mozzarella|cheddar|feta|parmesan|ricotta/.test(n)) return 'cheese';
  if (/milk|cream|butter|yogurt|yoghurt|dairy/.test(n)) return 'dairy';
  if (/oil\b|olive\s*oil|sesame\s*oil/.test(n)) return 'oil';
  if (/nut|almond|walnut|cashew|pistachio|pecan|hazelnut/.test(n)) return 'nut';
  if (/seed|chia|flax|pumpkin\s*seed|sunflower\s*seed/.test(n)) return 'seed';
  if (/bean|lentil|chickpea|legume|tofu|tempeh|edamame/.test(n)) return 'legume';
  if (/flour|rice|pasta|grain|bread|dough|cereal|oat|barley|quinoa/.test(n)) return 'grain';
  if (/spice|pepper|cumin|paprika|cinnamon|turmeric/.test(n)) return 'spice';
  if (/herb|basil|thyme|rosemary|parsley|cilantro|mint|oregano/.test(n)) return 'herb';
  if (/sauce|vinegar|mustard|ketchup|soy|honey|syrup|miso|tahini/.test(n)) return 'condiment';
  if (/tomato|onion|garlic|carrot|potato|spinach|broccoli|vegetable|veg/.test(n)) return 'vegetable';
  if (/apple|banana|mango|berry|fruit|lemon|orange|lime|avocado/.test(n)) return 'fruit';
  return 'default';
}

const PIECE_WEIGHTS = {
  'egg yolk': 18, 'egg white': 30, 'egg': 55, 'eggs': 55,
  'chicken breast': 180, 'chicken thigh': 150, 'chicken drumstick': 150, 'chicken leg': 200,
  'salmon fillet': 180, 'fillet': 150, 'fillets': 150,
  'can': 400, 'cans': 400, 'jar': 350, 'jars': 350,
  'slice': 25, 'slices': 25, 'rasher': 28, 'rashers': 28, 'strip': 20, 'strips': 20,
  'clove': 5, 'cloves': 5, 'bunch': 80, 'bunches': 80,
  'stalk': 40, 'stalks': 40, 'sprig': 5, 'sprigs': 5,
  'lemon': 80, 'lime': 60, 'orange': 130,
  'avocado': 200, 'banana': 120, 'apple': 180,
  'tomato': 150, 'onion': 150, 'carrot': 80,
  'potato': 150, 'sweet potato': 180,
  'bell pepper': 120, 'capsicum': 120,
  'cucumber': 200, 'zucchini': 200, 'eggplant': 350,
  'corn': 280, 'head': 500,
  'piece': 100, 'pieces': 100, 'unit': 100,
};

const UNIT_TO_GRAMS = {
  g: 1, gram: 1, grams: 1,
  kg: 1000, kilogram: 1000, kilograms: 1000,
  oz: 28.35, ounce: 28.35, ounces: 28.35,
  lb: 453.59, lbs: 453.59, pound: 453.59, pounds: 453.59,
};

const UNIT_TO_ML = {
  ml: 1, milliliter: 1, milliliters: 1,
  l: 1000, liter: 1000, litre: 1000, liters: 1000, litres: 1000,
  dl: 100,
  cup: 240, cups: 240,
  tbsp: 15, tablespoon: 15, tablespoons: 15,
  tsp: 5, teaspoon: 5, teaspoons: 5,
  'fl oz': 29.57, floz: 29.57,
};

const LIQUID_KEYWORDS = [
  'oil', 'milk', 'cream', 'broth', 'stock', 'sauce', 'juice', 'vinegar',
  'wine', 'beer', 'syrup', 'honey', 'ketchup', 'soy', 'fish sauce',
  'mayo', 'mustard', 'extract', 'water', 'mirin', 'sake', 'dressing',
];

function isLiquid(name) {
  const lower = (name || '').toLowerCase();
  return LIQUID_KEYWORDS.some(kw => lower.includes(kw));
}

function parseFrac(str) {
  const s = String(str).trim();
  if (s.includes('/')) {
    const [n, d] = s.split('/');
    return parseFloat(n) / parseFloat(d);
  }
  return parseFloat(s.replace(',', '.'));
}

function parseAmount(amountStr, ingredientName = '') {
  if (!amountStr) return null;
  const s = String(amountStr).trim().toLowerCase();
  const ing = (ingredientName || '').toLowerCase();

  const parenG = s.match(/\((?:about\s*|~\s*)?(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*g\)/i);
  if (parenG) return { grams: parseFloat(parenG[1]), ml: null, pieces: null };
  const parenMl = s.match(/\((?:about\s*|~\s*)?(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*ml\)/i);
  if (parenMl) return { grams: null, ml: parseFloat(parenMl[1]), pieces: null };

  const numMatch = s.match(/^([\d.,]+(?:\s+\d+\s*\/\s*\d+)?|\d+\s*\/\s*\d+)/);
  if (!numMatch) return null;
  const quantity = parseFrac(numMatch[1].trim());
  if (!Number.isFinite(quantity) || quantity <= 0) return null;
  const rest = s.slice(numMatch[0].length).trim();

  for (const [unit, factor] of Object.entries(UNIT_TO_GRAMS)) {
    if (new RegExp(`^${unit}\\b`, 'i').test(rest)) return { grams: quantity * factor, ml: null, pieces: null };
  }
  for (const [unit, factor] of Object.entries(UNIT_TO_ML)) {
    if (new RegExp(`^${unit}\\b`, 'i').test(rest)) return { grams: null, ml: quantity * factor, pieces: null };
  }

  const pieceWords = ['egg','eggs','piece','pieces','unit','units','slice','slices','rasher','rashers','can','cans','jar','jars','bunch','bunches','stalk','stalks','sprig','sprigs','fillet','fillets','clove','cloves','head','strip','strips'];
  for (const word of pieceWords) {
    if (rest.startsWith(word) || (!rest && ing.endsWith(word))) {
      for (const [key, g] of Object.entries(PIECE_WEIGHTS)) {
        if (ing.includes(key)) return { grams: quantity * g, ml: null, pieces: quantity };
      }
      if (PIECE_WEIGHTS[word]) return { grams: quantity * PIECE_WEIGHTS[word], ml: null, pieces: quantity };
      return { grams: null, ml: null, pieces: quantity };
    }
  }

  for (const [key, g] of Object.entries(PIECE_WEIGHTS)) {
    if (ing.includes(key)) return { grams: quantity * g, ml: null, pieces: quantity };
  }

  if (isLiquid(ing)) return { grams: null, ml: quantity, pieces: null };
  return { grams: quantity, ml: null, pieces: null };
}

/**
 * PHASE 3 — 5-tier lookup pipeline:
 *   Tier 1: exact_canonical  — direct pattern match on raw name
 *   Tier 2: alias_match      — synonym map resolves → re-run pattern match
 *   Tier 3: stripped_match   — adjective-stripped name pattern match
 *   Tier 4: auto_canonical   — generate + cache a smart default entry
 *   Tier 5: null             — caller falls through to category_fallback
 *
 * Returns: { entry, match_type }
 */
function lookupPrice(ingredientName) {
  if (!ingredientName) return { entry: null, match_type: 'unresolved' };
  const lower = (ingredientName || '').toLowerCase().trim();

  // Tier 1: exact canonical pattern match
  for (const entry of CANONICAL_PRICE_TABLE) {
    if (entry.pattern.test(lower)) return { entry, match_type: 'exact_canonical' };
  }

  // Tier 2: synonym/alias map → re-run against canonical table
  const normalized = normalizeIngredientName(lower);
  const synonymResolved = lookupSynonym(normalized) || lookupSynonym(lower);
  if (synonymResolved) {
    const syn = synonymResolved.toLowerCase();
    for (const entry of CANONICAL_PRICE_TABLE) {
      if (entry.pattern.test(syn)) return { entry, match_type: 'alias_match' };
    }
  }

  // Tier 3: adjective-stripped match
  if (normalized && normalized !== lower) {
    for (const entry of CANONICAL_PRICE_TABLE) {
      if (entry.pattern.test(normalized)) return { entry, match_type: 'stripped_match' };
    }
    // Also try synonym on stripped
    const synOnStripped = lookupSynonym(normalized);
    if (synOnStripped) {
      const syn = synOnStripped.toLowerCase();
      for (const entry of CANONICAL_PRICE_TABLE) {
        if (entry.pattern.test(syn)) return { entry, match_type: 'alias_match' };
      }
    }
  }

  // Tier 4: auto-canonical — generate a smart default entry
  const autoEntry = generateAutoCanonical(ingredientName);
  return { entry: autoEntry, match_type: 'auto_canonical' };
}

function computeIngredientCost(name, amountStr, baseGrams = null) {
  const { entry, match_type } = lookupPrice(name);
  // For auto_canonical: treat as a canonical entry but with category_fallback source label
  // For alias/stripped: treat as canonical with their own source labels
  const isAutoCanonical = match_type === 'auto_canonical';
  const category = entry?.category ?? guessIngredientCategory(name);
  const edible = entry?.edible_ratio ?? 1.0;
  const display_min = CATEGORY_DISPLAY_MIN[category] ?? CATEGORY_DISPLAY_MIN.default;
  const sanity_max = SANITY_MAX_PER_INGREDIENT[category] ?? SANITY_MAX_PER_INGREDIENT.default;

  const ingredientMin = entry?.min_rate ?? null;
  const ingredientMax = entry?.max_rate ?? null;
  const categoryRange = CATEGORY_RANGES[category] ?? CATEGORY_RANGES.default;

  const debugInfo = {
    canonical_match: entry?.name ?? null,
    category,
    source_path: null,
    pricing_basis: null,
    normalized_amount: null,
    usd_base_rate: entry?.base_rate ?? null,
    ingredient_min_rate: ingredientMin,
    ingredient_max_rate: ingredientMax,
    usd_price: null,
    floor_applied: false,
    cap_applied: false,
    anomaly_flag: false,
    confidence: null,
    input_name: name,
    input_amount: amountStr,
    edible_ratio: edible,
  };

  const applyAndReturn = (rawCost, quantityUnits, priceSource, confidence, pricingBasis) => {
    debugInfo.pricing_basis = pricingBasis;
    debugInfo.normalized_amount = quantityUnits;
    debugInfo.confidence = confidence;

    let ratePerUnit = quantityUnits > 0 ? (rawCost / quantityUnits) * 100 : 0;
    let floor_applied = false;
    let cap_applied = false;

    if (entry) {
      if (ingredientMin !== null && ratePerUnit < ingredientMin) {
        ratePerUnit = ingredientMin;
        floor_applied = true;
        debugInfo.source_path = 'floor_protected';
      } else if (ingredientMax !== null && ratePerUnit > ingredientMax) {
        ratePerUnit = ingredientMax;
        cap_applied = true;
        debugInfo.source_path = debugInfo.source_path || (isAutoCanonical ? 'auto_canonical' : match_type === 'alias_match' ? 'alias_match' : match_type === 'stripped_match' ? 'alias_match' : 'exact_canonical');
      } else {
        if (!debugInfo.source_path) {
          if (isAutoCanonical) debugInfo.source_path = 'auto_canonical';
          else if (match_type === 'alias_match' || match_type === 'stripped_match') debugInfo.source_path = 'alias_match';
          else debugInfo.source_path = 'exact_canonical';
        }
      }
    } else {
      if (ratePerUnit < categoryRange.min) { ratePerUnit = categoryRange.min; floor_applied = true; }
      else if (ratePerUnit > categoryRange.max) { ratePerUnit = categoryRange.max; cap_applied = true; }
      debugInfo.source_path = 'category_fallback';
    }

    let validatedCost = quantityUnits > 0 ? (ratePerUnit / 100) * quantityUnits : (ratePerUnit > 0 ? ratePerUnit * 1.0 : 0);

    debugInfo.floor_applied = floor_applied;
    debugInfo.cap_applied = cap_applied;

    if (validatedCost < display_min && validatedCost > 0) {
      validatedCost = display_min;
      debugInfo.floor_applied = true;
    }

    // Poultry protein protection
    let proteinAnomalyFlag = false;
    if (category === 'poultry' && quantityUnits > 0) {
      const effectiveUsdPer100g = (validatedCost / quantityUnits) * 100;
      const effectiveIlsPerKg = effectiveUsdPer100g * POULTRY_ILS_RATE_REF * 10;
      debugInfo.effective_price_per_kg = `$${(effectiveUsdPer100g * 10).toFixed(2)}/kg | ₪${effectiveIlsPerKg.toFixed(1)}/kg`;
      if (effectiveUsdPer100g < POULTRY_USD_MIN_PER_100G) {
        proteinAnomalyFlag = true;
        validatedCost = (quantityUnits / 100) * POULTRY_USD_MIN_PER_100G;
        debugInfo.source_path = 'floor_protected';
        debugInfo.floor_applied = true;
      }
    }

    const sanityAnomalyFlag = validatedCost > sanity_max;
    if (sanityAnomalyFlag) {
      console.warn(`[PricingEngine] SANITY MAX: "${name}" $${validatedCost.toFixed(2)} > $${sanity_max} (${category})`);
    }

    debugInfo.anomaly_flag = proteinAnomalyFlag || sanityAnomalyFlag;
    debugInfo.usd_price = validatedCost;

    return {
      cost: parseFloat(validatedCost.toFixed(4)),
      grams_used: quantityUnits,
      price_source: priceSource,
      canonical_name: entry?.name ?? null,
      source_path: debugInfo.source_path,
      confidence,
      debug: debugInfo,
    };
  };

  const activeRate = entry
    ? (entry.price_per_100g ?? entry.price_per_100ml ?? entry.base_rate ?? 0)
    : (() => {
        if (category === 'grain') {
          const doughSub = classifyDoughSubcategory(name);
          if (doughSub) {
            const dr = DOUGH_RANGES[doughSub];
            return dr.min + (dr.max - dr.min) * 0.25;
          }
        }
        return categoryRange.min + (categoryRange.max - categoryRange.min) * 0.25;
      })();

  // PATH A: base_grams from NutritionEngine
  if (baseGrams != null && baseGrams > 0 && entry) {
    let rawCost = 0;
    let basis = '';
    if (entry.price_per_100ml != null && isLiquid(name)) {
      rawCost = (baseGrams * edible / 100) * entry.price_per_100ml;
      basis = `base_ml=${baseGrams}ml × $${entry.price_per_100ml}/100ml`;
    } else if (entry.price_per_100g != null) {
      rawCost = (baseGrams * edible / 100) * entry.price_per_100g;
      basis = `base_grams=${baseGrams}g × $${entry.price_per_100g}/100g`;
    } else if (entry.base_rate != null) {
      rawCost = (baseGrams * edible / 100) * entry.base_rate;
      basis = `base_grams=${baseGrams}g × $${entry.base_rate}/100g`;
    }
    if (rawCost > 0) return applyAndReturn(rawCost, baseGrams, 'canonical_base_grams', 'high', basis);
  }

  // PATH B: parse amount string
  const parsed = parseAmount(amountStr, name);
  if (!parsed) {
    debugInfo.source_path = 'unresolved_no_amount';
    return { cost: null, reason: `Could not parse amount: "${amountStr}"`, source_path: 'unresolved', debug: debugInfo };
  }

  let { grams, ml, pieces } = parsed;

  if (entry) {
    if (ml != null && entry.price_per_100g != null && entry.price_per_100ml == null) { grams = ml; ml = null; }

    if (grams == null && ml == null && pieces != null && entry.price_per_piece != null) {
      const rawCost = pieces * entry.price_per_piece;
      return applyAndReturn(rawCost, pieces * 50, 'per_piece', 'high', `${pieces} × $${entry.price_per_piece}/piece`);
    }

    if (grams != null) {
      const rate = entry.price_per_100g ?? entry.base_rate ?? 0;
      const rawCost = (grams * edible / 100) * rate;
      return applyAndReturn(rawCost, grams, 'canonical_g', 'high', `${grams}g × $${rate}/100g`);
    }

    if (ml != null) {
      const rate = entry.price_per_100ml ?? entry.base_rate ?? 0;
      const rawCost = (ml * edible / 100) * rate;
      return applyAndReturn(rawCost, ml, 'canonical_ml', 'high', `${ml}ml × $${rate}/100ml`);
    }

    if (pieces != null) {
      const fallbackGrams = pieces * 100;
      const rate = entry.price_per_100g ?? entry.base_rate ?? 0;
      const rawCost = (fallbackGrams * edible / 100) * rate;
      return applyAndReturn(rawCost, fallbackGrams, 'piece_gram_fallback', 'medium', `${pieces} pieces → ${fallbackGrams}g`);
    }
  }

  // PATH C: entry exists (auto_canonical or real) but no amount resolved from parsing
  // → use the entry's base_rate against estimated quantity
  const totalFallback = grams ?? ml ?? (pieces != null ? pieces * 100 : 0);
  if (totalFallback > 0) {
    if (!entry) {
      // Truly no entry — pure category fallback
      debugInfo.source_path = 'category_fallback';
      const rawCost = (totalFallback / 100) * activeRate;
      return applyAndReturn(rawCost, totalFallback, 'category_fallback', 'low',
        `${totalFallback}units × $${activeRate.toFixed(3)}/100 (${category} fallback)`);
    }
    // Auto-canonical or real entry — use its rate
    const rate = entry.price_per_100g ?? entry.price_per_100ml ?? entry.base_rate ?? activeRate;
    const rawCost = (totalFallback * edible / 100) * rate;
    return applyAndReturn(rawCost, totalFallback, isAutoCanonical ? 'auto_canonical' : 'canonical_fallback_qty', 'medium',
      `${totalFallback}units × $${rate}/100 (${match_type})`);
  }

  debugInfo.source_path = 'unresolved';
  return { cost: null, reason: `No quantity resolved for "${name}" amount="${amountStr}"`, source_path: 'unresolved', debug: debugInfo };
}

Deno.serve(async (req) => {
  try {
    const base44 = createClientFromRequest(req);
    const { recipe_id } = await req.json();

    if (!recipe_id) return Response.json({ error: 'Missing recipe_id' }, { status: 400 });

    const recipes = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.Recipe.filter({ id: recipe_id });
    if (!recipes.length) return Response.json({ error: 'Recipe not found' }, { status: 404 });

    const recipe = recipes[0];
    const servings = Math.max(1, recipe.servings || 1);
    const allIngredientGroups = recipe.ingredients || [];

    let totalCost = 0;
    let pricedCount = 0;
    let missingCount = 0;
    let hasUnknownPricing = false;
    const unresolvedLog = [];
    const pricingDebug = [];
    const confidences = [];
    let exactCanonicalCount = 0;
    let aliasMatchCount = 0;
    let autoCanonicalCount = 0;
    let floorProtectedCount = 0;
    let categoryFallbackCount = 0;

    const updatedGroups = allIngredientGroups.map(group => {
      const updatedItems = (group.items || []).map(item => {
        if (!item?.name) return item;

        const result = computeIngredientCost(item.name, item.amount, item.base_grams);
        const sourcePath = result.source_path ?? result.debug?.source_path ?? 'unresolved';

        if (sourcePath === 'exact_canonical') exactCanonicalCount++;
        else if (sourcePath === 'alias_match') aliasMatchCount++;
        else if (sourcePath === 'auto_canonical') autoCanonicalCount++;
        else if (sourcePath === 'floor_protected') floorProtectedCount++;
        else if (sourcePath === 'category_fallback') categoryFallbackCount++;

        if (result.cost != null && result.cost > 0) {
          totalCost += result.cost;
          pricedCount++;
          confidences.push(result.confidence ?? 'medium');
          pricingDebug.push({
            name: item.name,
            amount: item.amount,
            base_grams: item.base_grams ?? null,
            cost_usd: `$${result.cost.toFixed(3)}`,
            source_path: sourcePath,
            canonical: result.canonical_name,
            confidence: result.confidence,
            anomaly_flag: result.debug?.anomaly_flag ?? false,
            ingredient_range: result.debug?.ingredient_min_rate != null
              ? `$${result.debug.ingredient_min_rate}–$${result.debug.ingredient_max_rate}/100`
              : null,
          });
          return {
            ...item,
            ingredient_cost: parseFloat(result.cost.toFixed(4)),
            _price_source: result.price_source,
            _price_source_path: sourcePath,
            _price_confidence: result.confidence,
          };
        } else {
          missingCount++;
          if (!item.optional) hasUnknownPricing = true;
          unresolvedLog.push({ name: item.name, amount: item.amount, reason: result.reason || 'no_match', source_path: sourcePath });

          if (item.ingredient_cost != null && item.ingredient_cost > 0) {
            totalCost += item.ingredient_cost;
            pricedCount++;
            return item;
          }
          return { ...item, ingredient_cost: null, _price_source: 'unresolved', _price_source_path: sourcePath, _price_confidence: 'low' };
        }
      });
      return { ...group, items: updatedItems };
    });

    const totalItems = allIngredientGroups.reduce((s, g) => s + (g.items?.length || 0), 0);

    if (pricedCount === 0 && totalItems > 0) {
      console.error(`[estimateRecipePricing] PIPELINE FAILURE: 0/${totalItems} priced for ${recipe_id}`);
    }

    const costPerServing = totalCost / servings;
    const overallConfidence = confidences.length === 0 ? 'low'
      : confidences.filter(c => c === 'high').length > confidences.length / 2 ? 'high'
      : confidences.filter(c => c === 'medium').length > 0 ? 'medium' : 'low';

    await base44.asServiceRole.entities.Recipe.update(recipe_id, {
      total_cost: parseFloat(totalCost.toFixed(4)),
      cost_per_serving: parseFloat(costPerServing.toFixed(4)),
      has_unknown_pricing: hasUnknownPricing,
      ingredients: updatedGroups,
    });

    console.log(
      `[estimateRecipePricing] recipe=${recipe_id} ` +
      `total=$${totalCost.toFixed(2)} per_serving=$${costPerServing.toFixed(2)} ` +
      `priced=${pricedCount}/${totalItems} unresolved=${missingCount} ` +
      `exact=${exactCanonicalCount} alias=${aliasMatchCount} auto=${autoCanonicalCount} floor=${floorProtectedCount} fallback=${categoryFallbackCount} ` +
      `confidence=${overallConfidence}`
    );
    if (unresolvedLog.length > 0) console.warn(`[estimateRecipePricing] Unresolved:`, JSON.stringify(unresolvedLog));

    return Response.json({
      recipe_id,
      total_cost: parseFloat(totalCost.toFixed(4)),
      cost_per_serving: parseFloat(costPerServing.toFixed(4)),
      has_unknown_pricing: hasUnknownPricing,
      priced_ingredients: pricedCount,
      total_ingredients: totalItems,
      overall_confidence: overallConfidence,
      source_path_summary: {
        exact_canonical: exactCanonicalCount,
        alias_match: aliasMatchCount,
        auto_canonical: autoCanonicalCount,
        floor_protected: floorProtectedCount,
        category_fallback: categoryFallbackCount,
        coverage_pct: totalItems > 0
          ? Math.round(((exactCanonicalCount + aliasMatchCount + floorProtectedCount) / totalItems) * 100)
          : 100,
      },
      unresolved: unresolvedLog,
      pricing_debug: pricingDebug,
    });

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[estimateRecipePricing] Error:', error);
    return Response.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
  }
});

  vegetables: "🥬",

  grains: "🌾",
  spices: "🌿",

  legumes_beans: "🫘",

  oils_fats: "🫒",
  sauces_condiments: "🫙",
  sweeteners: "🍯",
};

function resolveEmoji(name, category) {
  const lower = (name || "").toLowerCase().trim();

  // 1. Exact match
  if (EMOJI_MAP[lower]) return EMOJI_MAP[lower];

  // 2. Keyword patterns
  for (const [pattern, emoji] of KEYWORD_PATTERNS) {
    if (pattern.test(lower)) return emoji;
  }

  // 3. Category fallback
  return CATEGORY_FALLBACK[category] || "🍽️";
}

const BAD_ICONS = new Set(['🍳', '❓', '?', '', 'null', 'undefined']);

function isBadIcon(icon) {
  if (!icon) return true;
  if (BAD_ICONS.has(icon)) return true;
  // Single non-food emoji that shouldn't be on ingredients
  if (icon === '🍳') return true; // frying pan is never correct as standalone icon
  return false;
}

Deno.serve(async (req) => {
  try {
    const base44 = createClientFromRequest(req);
    const user = await base44.auth.me();
    if (!user || user.role !== 'admin') {
      return Response.json({ error: 'Admin access required' }, { status: 403 });
    }

    const body = await req.json().catch(() => ({}));
    const { dry_run = false, fix_bad_only = false } = body;

    // Fetch ALL IngredientCache records
    let allRecords = [];
    let skip = 0;
    const limit = 200;
    while (true) {
      const batch = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.IngredientCache.list(null, limit, skip);
      if (!batch || batch.length === 0) break;
      allRecords = allRecords.concat(batch);
      skip += limit;
      if (batch.length < limit) break;
    }

    console.log(`[FixIcons] Found ${allRecords.length} IngredientCache records`);

    const toFix = allRecords.filter(r => {
      if (fix_bad_only) return isBadIcon(r.icon);
      // Fix any that have bad icons OR emoji icons (not http URLs)
      return isBadIcon(r.icon) || (r.icon && !r.icon.startsWith('http'));
    });

    console.log(`[FixIcons] ${toFix.length} records need icon fixes`);

    if (dry_run) {
      const sample = toFix.slice(0, 20).map(r => ({
        name: r.name,
        current_icon: r.icon,
        proposed_icon: resolveEmoji(r.name, r.category),
      }));
      return Response.json({
        total: allRecords.length,
        to_fix: toFix.length,
        sample,
        message: `Dry run: ${toFix.length} icons need fixing`
      });
    }

    // Apply fixes
    let fixed = 0;
    let failed = 0;
    const errors = [];

    for (const record of toFix) {
      try {
        const correctEmoji = resolveEmoji(record.name, record.category);
        await base44.asServiceRole.entities.IngredientCache.update(record.id, {
          icon: correctEmoji,
        });
        fixed++;
      } catch (e) {
        failed++;
        errors.push({ name: record.name, error: e.message });
      }
    }

    return Response.json({
      success: true,
      total_records: allRecords.length,
      fixed,
      failed,
      errors: errors.slice(0, 10),
      message: `Fixed ${fixed} ingredient icons. ${failed} failed.`
    });

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[fixIngredientCacheIcons] Error:', error.message);
    return Response.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
  }
});

/**
 * pricingAutoCanonical — Phase 3 Auto-Canonical Engine
 *
 * This module provides:
 * 1. SYNONYM_MAP      — alias → canonical key (handles 1000s of name variants)
 * 2. AUTO_CANONICAL   — in-memory learned entries for first-seen unknowns
 * 3. normalizeIngredientName() — text normalization pipeline
 * 4. resolveIngredient()       — 5-tier matching: exact | alias | stripped | auto | category
 * 5. generateAutoCanonical()   — smart default generation with category-median pricing
 *
 * MATCH PRIORITY:
 *   1. exact_canonical  — direct pattern match in CANONICAL_PRICE_TABLE
 *   2. alias_match      — synonym map resolves to a canonical key
 *   3. stripped_match   — adjective-stripped name matches canonical
 *   4. auto_canonical   — previously learned auto-generated entry
 *   5. category_fallback — last resort
 *
 * SAFETY: Auto-generated entries still obey category ranges + protein protection.
 */

import { createClientFromRequest } from 'npm:@base44/sdk@0.8.23';

// ─── IN-MEMORY AUTO-CANONICAL CACHE ───────────────────────────────────────────
// Stores auto-generated entries for ingredients not in canonical table.
// Format: { normalizedName: { name, category, base_rate, min_rate, max_rate, edible_ratio, source: 'auto' } }
export const AUTO_CANONICAL_CACHE = {};

// ─── CATEGORY GUESSER (comprehensive) ────────────────────────────────────────
export function guessIngredientCategory(name) {
  const n = name.toLowerCase();

  // Most specific first
  if (/chicken|turkey|duck|goose|poultry|hen|quail|pheasant/.test(n)) return 'poultry';
  if (/beef|veal|pork|lamb|mutton|venison|bison|rabbit|game|steak|mince|minced|ground meat|burger|sausage|bacon|ham|chorizo|prosciutto|pancetta|salami|pepperoni|coppa|lard/.test(n)) return 'meat';
  if (/salmon|tuna|cod|tilapia|halibut|trout|mackerel|sardine|anchovy|shrimp|prawn|scallop|lobster|crab|mussel|clam|oyster|squid|octopus|herring|pollock|snapper|grouper|fish|seafood|caviar|roe/.test(n)) return 'seafood';
  if (/\begg\b|\beggs\b/.test(n)) return 'eggs';
  if (/parmesan|mozzarella|cheddar|feta|ricotta|brie|camembert|gouda|gruyere|halloumi|burrata|paneer|cheese/.test(n)) return 'cheese';
  if (/\bbutter\b|\bghee\b|cream\b|yogurt|yoghurt|milk\b|kefir|labneh|quark/.test(n)) return 'dairy';
  if (/olive oil|sesame oil|coconut oil|avocado oil|vegetable oil|sunflower oil|canola oil|\boil\b/.test(n)) return 'oil';
  if (/almond|walnut|cashew|pistachio|pecan|hazelnut|macadamia|brazil nut|pine nut|peanut|chestnut|nut\b/.test(n)) return 'nut';
  if (/chia seed|flax seed|hemp seed|sesame seed|pumpkin seed|sunflower seed|\bseed\b/.test(n)) return 'seed';
  if (/chickpea|lentil|black bean|kidney bean|white bean|pinto bean|edamame|tofu|tempeh|legume|\bbean\b|\bbeans\b/.test(n)) return 'legume';
  if (/flour|pasta|rice\b|noodle|bread|dough|pastry|cereal|oat|barley|quinoa|couscous|bulgur|millet|spelt|farro/.test(n)) return 'grain';
  if (/saffron|vanilla|cardamom|nutmeg|cinnamon|pepper\b|paprika|cumin|turmeric|garam masala|curry powder|allspice|cloves|star anise/.test(n)) return 'spice';
  if (/chili|chilli|jalapen|habanero|serrano|cayenne|ginger|garlic powder|onion powder/.test(n)) return 'spice';
  if (/basil|parsley|thyme|rosemary|oregano|dill|mint|chive|cilantro|coriander\b|sage|tarragon|lemongrass/.test(n)) return 'herb';
  if (/vinegar|soy sauce|fish sauce|ketchup|mustard|mayonnaise|honey|maple syrup|miso|tahini|pesto|salsa|curry paste|hot sauce|bbq|hoisin|teriyaki|worcestershire|\bwine\b|\bbeer\b|broth|stock/.test(n)) return 'condiment';
  if (/tomato|onion|garlic|carrot|potato|spinach|broccoli|cauliflower|zucchini|courgette|pepper\b|capsicum|mushroom|asparagus|kale|cabbage|lettuce|celery|cucumber|pea\b|peas\b|corn\b|leek|fennel|eggplant|aubergine|beetroot/.test(n)) return 'vegetable';
  if (/apple|banana|mango|berry|berries|lemon|lime|orange|avocado|grape|cherry|peach|pear|plum|fig|melon|pineapple|kiwi|papaya|passion fruit|date\b/.test(n)) return 'fruit';
  if (/salt|sugar|flour|starch|baking|yeast|cocoa|chocolate|vanilla\b|syrup|jam\b|jelly\b/.test(n)) return 'pantry';
  return 'default';
}

// ─── TEXT NORMALIZER ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Strips adjective prefixes, normalizes whitespace, lowercases
export function normalizeIngredientName(raw) {
  if (!raw) return '';
  let n = raw.toLowerCase().trim();
  // Collapse whitespace
  n = n.replace(/\s+/g, ' ');
  // Remove common adjective prefixes that don't change canonical identity
  n = n.replace(/\b(very\s+|extra\s+|super\s+|ultra\s+|premium\s+|quality\s+|best\s+|good\s+|great\s+|nice\s+|lovely\s+)/gi, '');
  // Strip preparation adjectives
  n = n.replace(/\b(freshly\s+|lightly\s+|thinly\s+|finely\s+|roughly\s+|coarsely\s+|well\s+|firmly\s+|briefly\s+|slowly\s+|gently\s+)/gi, '');
  // Strip state/form adjectives
  n = n.replace(/\b(fresh|dried|frozen|canned|tinned|organic|raw|whole|chopped|diced|sliced|minced|grated|shredded|blanched|roasted|grilled|baked|cooked|toasted|ground|crushed|mashed|puréed|pureed|pickled|smoked|steamed|boiled|fried|sautéed|sauteed|dehydrated|reconstituted|rehydrated)\s+/gi, '');
  // Strip size adjectives
  n = n.replace(/\b(large|medium|small|big|tiny|baby|young|aged|mature|ripe|unripe|overripe|mini|giant|jumbo|regular)\s+/gi, '');
  // Strip colour when it precedes a noun that would match without it
  // (preserve colours that ARE the canonical name, e.g. "red onion", "green pepper")
  // Strip nationality/origin adjectives that don't change identity
  n = n.replace(/\b(french|italian|spanish|greek|japanese|chinese|thai|indian|moroccan|mexican|american|british|australian|european|asian|mediterranean|middle eastern)\s+/gi, '');
  return n.trim();
}

// ─── SYNONYM LOOKUP ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Returns canonical lookup text if input matches a synonym, else null
export function lookupSynonym(normalizedName) {
  // Direct match
  if (SYNONYM_MAP[normalizedName]) return SYNONYM_MAP[normalizedName];
  // Partial/contained match — check if any synonym key is contained in the name
  for (const [alias, canonical] of Object.entries(SYNONYM_MAP)) {
    if (normalizedName.includes(alias) && alias.length > 3) return canonical;
  }
  return null;
}

// ─── MODIFIER DETECTION TABLE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Each modifier has: pattern (regex), multiplier, type label
const MODIFIER_TABLE = [
  // PREMIUM SIGNALS — increase price
  { pattern: /\bwagyu\b/i,          multiplier: 2.5,  type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\btruffle\b/i,        multiplier: 2.2,  type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\bimported\b/i,       multiplier: 1.6,  type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\bartisan\b/i,        multiplier: 1.5,  type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\bspecialty\b/i,      multiplier: 1.45, type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\bpremium\b/i,        multiplier: 1.4,  type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\bwild.caught\b/i,    multiplier: 1.35, type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\bwild\s*caught\b/i,  multiplier: 1.35, type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\baged\b/i,           multiplier: 1.3,  type: 'premium' },
  { pattern: /\borganic\b/i,        multiplier: 1.2,  type: 'premium' },
  // BUDGET SIGNALS — decrease price
  { pattern: /\bgeneric\b/i,        multiplier: 0.75, type: 'budget' },
  { pattern: /\bbasic\b/i,          multiplier: 0.80, type: 'budget' },
  { pattern: /\bstandard\b/i,       multiplier: 0.82, type: 'budget' },
  { pattern: /\bfrozen\b/i,         multiplier: 0.78, type: 'budget' },
  { pattern: /\bcanned\b/i,         multiplier: 0.72, type: 'budget' },
  { pattern: /\btinned\b/i,         multiplier: 0.72, type: 'budget' },
  // FORM SIGNALS — dried/powder/concentrate are denser → slightly higher rate
  { pattern: /\bdried\b/i,          multiplier: 1.15, type: 'form' },
  { pattern: /\bpowder\b/i,         multiplier: 1.20, type: 'form' },
  { pattern: /\bconcentrate\b/i,    multiplier: 1.25, type: 'form' },
  // PREPARATION SIGNALS — slight processing premium
  { pattern: /\bsliced\b/i,         multiplier: 1.05, type: 'prepared' },
  { pattern: /\bground\b/i,         multiplier: 1.05, type: 'prepared' },
  { pattern: /\bminced\b/i,         multiplier: 1.05, type: 'prepared' },
  { pattern: /\bprepared\b/i,       multiplier: 1.08, type: 'prepared' },
  { pattern: /\bcooked\b/i,         multiplier: 1.08, type: 'prepared' },
];

// ─── MODIFIER DETECTOR ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Returns { multiplier, modifiers_detected } for a given ingredient name.
// Compounds multiplicatively but clamps to category-safe bounds.
export function detectModifiers(ingredientName) {
  const n = (ingredientName || '').toLowerCase();
  const detected = [];
  let compoundMultiplier = 1.0;

  for (const mod of MODIFIER_TABLE) {
    if (mod.pattern.test(n)) {
      // Extract clean signal label from pattern string (between word boundaries)
      const label = mod.pattern.source.replace(/\\b/g, '').replace(/\\s[\*\+\?]*/g, ' ').replace(/[\[\]\(\)\^$]/g, '').trim();
      detected.push({ signal: label, multiplier: mod.multiplier, type: mod.type });
      compoundMultiplier *= mod.multiplier;
    }
  }

  // Sanity clamp: prevent runaway compounding
  // Premium cap: 3.0x, Budget floor: 0.6x
  compoundMultiplier = Math.min(3.0, Math.max(0.6, compoundMultiplier));

  return { multiplier: compoundMultiplier, modifiers_detected: detected };
}

// ─── AUTO-CANONICAL GENERATOR ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Creates a context-aware canonical entry for an unknown ingredient.
// Detects quality/form/preparation modifiers and adjusts pricing.
// Always clamps within category bounds.
export function generateAutoCanonical(ingredientName) {
  const category = guessIngredientCategory(ingredientName);
  const medians = CATEGORY_MEDIANS[category] ?? CATEGORY_MEDIANS.default;
  const key = ingredientName.toLowerCase().trim();

  if (AUTO_CANONICAL_CACHE[key]) return AUTO_CANONICAL_CACHE[key];

  // Detect modifiers and compute adjusted rate
  const { multiplier, modifiers_detected } = detectModifiers(ingredientName);
  const adjustedRate = medians.base * multiplier;

  // Clamp within category [min, max] bounds — never break safety
  const clampedRate = Math.min(medians.max, Math.max(medians.min, adjustedRate));

  // Confidence: medium if modifiers detected (more context), low otherwise
  const confidence = modifiers_detected.length > 0 ? 'low-medium' : 'low';

  const entry = {
    name: ingredientName,
    category,
    base_rate: parseFloat(clampedRate.toFixed(4)),
    min_rate: medians.min,
    max_rate: medians.max,
    edible_ratio: 1.0,
    source: 'auto_canonical',
    confidence,
    // Debug trace
    modifier_detected: modifiers_detected.map(m => m.signal),
    modifier_multiplier: parseFloat(multiplier.toFixed(4)),
    adjusted_base_rate: parseFloat(adjustedRate.toFixed(4)),
    median_base_rate: medians.base,
    was_clamped: adjustedRate !== clampedRate,
  };

  AUTO_CANONICAL_CACHE[key] = entry;
  return entry;
}

// ─── EXPORT: category medians for use in pricing engine ──────────────────────
export { CATEGORY_MEDIANS };

Deno.serve(async (req) => {
  // This function is a utility module — it serves diagnostic requests
  try {
    const base44 = createClientFromRequest(req);
    const user = await base44.auth.me();
    if (user?.role !== 'admin') return Response.json({ error: 'Admin only' }, { status: 403 });

    const body = await req.json().catch(() => ({}));
    const { action, ingredient } = body;

    if (action === 'test_synonym') {
      const normalized = normalizeIngredientName(ingredient || '');
      const synonym = lookupSynonym(normalized);
      const category = guessIngredientCategory(ingredient || '');
      const modifiers = detectModifiers(ingredient || '');
      const autoEntry = generateAutoCanonical(ingredient || '');
      return Response.json({ input: ingredient, normalized, synonym, category, modifiers, auto_canonical: autoEntry });
    }

    if (action === 'test_modifier') {
      const modifiers = detectModifiers(ingredient || '');
      const category = guessIngredientCategory(ingredient || '');
      const medians = { poultry:{base:1.20,min:0.90,max:1.70}, meat:{base:1.50,min:1.00,max:2.20}, seafood:{base:2.00,min:1.40,max:3.00}, default:{base:0.40,min:0.12,max:1.00} };
      const m = medians[category] || medians.default;
      const adjusted = m.base * modifiers.multiplier;
      return Response.json({
        input: ingredient, category,
        median_base: m.base, multiplier: modifiers.multiplier,
        adjusted_rate: parseFloat(adjusted.toFixed(4)),
        clamped_rate: parseFloat(Math.min(m.max, Math.max(m.min, adjusted)).toFixed(4)),
        modifiers_detected: modifiers.modifiers_detected,
      });
    }

    if (action === 'cache_stats') {
      return Response.json({
        synonym_count: Object.keys(SYNONYM_MAP).length,
        auto_canonical_cached: Object.keys(AUTO_CANONICAL_CACHE).length,
        cache: AUTO_CANONICAL_CACHE,
      });
    }

    return Response.json({
      synonym_count: Object.keys(SYNONYM_MAP).length,
      category_medians: CATEGORY_MEDIANS,
      usage: 'POST with { action: "test_synonym", ingredient: "..." } or { action: "cache_stats" }',
    });
  } catch (error) {
    return Response.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
  }
});

# QA PROOF CHECKLIST — Community Algorithm + Security

## PART 1: Like Toggle (Atomic, Idempotent)
- [x] Like toggle increments like_count by 1
- [x] Unlike toggle decrements like_count by 1
- [x] Spam toggling (like → unlike → like → ...) never doubles count
- [x] Refresh page: like_count matches database
- [x] Viewer context (viewer_has_liked) always correct
- [x] No race conditions: uses service role to read, user role to write
- [x] Notification created only once on first like

## PART 2: Data Isolation (Private vs Public)
**MUST-PASS: Test with 2 different accounts**
- [ ] Account A logs meal to MealLog: Account B cannot see it
- [ ] Account A's pantry items: Account B cannot list or read them
- [ ] Account A's saved posts: only Account A can query via their own filters
- [ ] Account B adds post to their pantry: does NOT affect Account A's pantry
- [ ] Public posts visible to both; private data completely hidden
- [ ] Row-level security enforced: every private read/write has `WHERE owner_id = auth.user_id`

## PART 3: Stage Ladder + Post Lifecycle
- [ ] New post created → stage = 1
- [ ] Post receives impressions in Stage 1 (~50)
- [ ] If metrics pass threshold, post advances to Stage 2
- [ ] If metrics fail, post status changes to 'limited' and stops pushing to ForYou
- [ ] Posts visible to followers always (even if limited)
- [ ] Direct link to post always works (even if limited)
- [ ] No post ever disappears unless author deletes it

## PART 4: For You Feed Ranking
- [ ] getForYouFeed returns posts sorted by RankScore
- [ ] RankScore = BaseScore * FreshnessBoost * Personalization * StageBoost - penalties
- [ ] Freshness: new posts boost, old posts decay
- [ ] Personalization: user diet/cuisine prefs boost matching posts
- [ ] Diversity: no author appears twice in first 10 results
- [ ] Viewer context: `viewer_has_liked` and `viewer_has_saved` correct
- [ ] Posts with integrity_score < 1.0 get penalized

## PART 5: Event Tracking (Frontend Instrumentation)
- [ ] Impression event fires only once per card per session (600ms + 50% visible)
- [ ] Open event fires when post card is clicked
- [ ] Dwell time logged correctly (time on post detail page)
- [ ] Like event logged atomically (via togglePostLike)
- [ ] Save event logged atomically (via togglePostSave)
- [ ] Hide/report events decrement integrity_score
- [ ] All events have correct timestamp and user_id

## PART 6: Notification System (In-App)
- [ ] Like notification created when Account A likes Account B's post
- [ ] No notification if Account A likes their own post
- [ ] Follow notification created when Account A follows Account B
- [ ] Comment notification created when Account A comments on Account B's post
- [ ] Unread count badge shows correctly
- [ ] Marking notification as read works
- [ ] Notifications visible only to intended recipient

## PART 7: Security (HARD CHECK)
- [ ] No route accepts raw user_id from frontend
- [ ] All private CRUD validated by auth context
- [ ] PostLike unique constraint prevents duplicates
- [ ] PostSave unique constraint prevents duplicates
- [ ] Service role used only for reads/audits, not to bypass ownership
- [ ] Rate limiting on like/save toggles (no spam)
- [ ] No user data fields leaked in public responses

## PART 8: Integration Tests (End-to-End)
1. Create post as Account A
2. Account B sees it in ForYou feed
3. Account B likes it → Account A gets notification
4. Account B saves it → appears in B's saved list (private)
5. Account A sees like_count incremented
6. Account B refreshes → like still visible
7. Account A follows Account B
8. Account A sees Account B's posts in Following feed (chronological)
9. Account A hides Account B's post → integrity_score decreases
10. Repeat on second post: post decays and stops appearing in ForYou

## PART 9: Performance Checks
- [ ] ForYou feed query completes in <500ms (limit=20)
- [ ] Following feed query completes in <300ms (limit=20)
- [ ] Like toggle completes in <200ms
- [ ] No N+1 queries (batch viewer context lookups)
- [ ] Pagination works (offset=0,20,40,...)

## PART 10: Admin Tooling
- [ ] calculateStageMetrics can be run manually per post
- [ ] Post status can be manually set to 'limited' if needed
- [ ] Metrics recompute from events correctly
- [ ] No posts stuck in stage 0 (sanity check forces stage 1)
- [ ] "Trending" list can be computed from stage 7+ posts

---

## HOW TO RUN QA

```bash
# Test 1: Like Toggle (manual)
1. Open post as User A
2. Click like
3. Page should show like_count = 1, heart filled
4. Refresh page → heart still filled, count still 1
5. Unlike
6. heart empty, count = 0
7. Spam toggle 10x fast → count goes 1, 0, 1, 0, ... never 2 or -1

# Test 2: Data Isolation (terminal, two sessions)
Session 1 (User A):
  - POST /api/createMealLog { servings: 2, ... }
  - GET /api/getMealLogs → returns 1 result
  
Session 2 (User B, different account):
  - GET /api/getMealLogs → should return empty or only User B's meals
  - Try GET /api/getMealLog/[User A's meal log ID] → 401 Forbidden

# Test 3: Stage Ladder
1. POST /api/createPost { title: "Test", ... }
   → Returns stage: 1
2. Manually fire 50 impression events
3. POST /api/calculateStageMetrics { post_id }
   → If score >= threshold, returns shouldAdvance: true, new stage: 2
``
